items.title: 100-days-of-ai
items.summary: Take the 100 Days of AI challenge - learn one AI concept a day, from machine learning basics to AI agents in production, in 100 days.
items.summary_cn: 参加100天的人工智能挑战-在100天内每天学习一个人工智能概念，从机器学习基础知识到生产中的人工智能代理。
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。

items.title: Zer0Fit
items.summary: Zero-shot forecasting, tabular classification, and regression via MCP — exposes Google TimesFM 2.5 and TabFM v1.0.0 to AI assistants. Just attach a CSV and describe what you want to predict.
items.summary_cn: 零点预测、表格分类和通过MCP进行回归—将Google TimesFM 2.5和TabFM v1.0.0暴露给AI助手。只需附上CSV文件并描述您想要预测的内容。
items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。

items.title: Do AI Agents Know When a Task Is Simple? Toward Complexity-Aware Reasoning and Execution
items.title_cn: 人工智能代理知道什么时候任务很简单吗？面向复杂性感知的推理和执行
items.summary: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly automate multi-step engineering and informatics workflows, yet they rarely ask how much effort a task actually requires. They often follow a maximum-context-first strategy--re-reading files and dependencies they have already seen--turning a one-line edi...
items.summary_cn: 大型语言模型（ LLM ）代理越来越多地自动化多步骤工程和信息学工作流程，但他们很少询问任务实际需要多少工作量。他们通常遵循最大上下文优先策略-重新阅读他们已经看到的文件和依赖项-转换单行EDI...
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: TerraZero: Procedural Driving Simulation for Zero-Demonstration Self-Play at Scale
items.title_cn: TerraZero ：大规模零演示自我播放的程序化驾驶模拟
items.summary: Training robust autonomous driving agents requires a simulator that is fast enough for reinforcement learning at scale, realistic enough to ground behavior in real-world map structure, and diverse enough to cover the safety-critical long tail that logged data rarely contains. We present TerraZero, a...
items.summary_cn: 训练强大的自动驾驶代理需要一个足够快的模拟器来进行大规模的强化学习，足够逼真以适应现实世界地图结构中的行为，并且足够多样化以覆盖记录数据很少包含的安全关键长尾。我们介绍TerraZero ，一个...
items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。

items.title: PalmClaw: A Native On-Device Agent Framework for Mobile Phones
items.title_cn: PalmClaw ：适用于手机的本地On-Device Agent框架
items.summary: Large Language Model (LLM) agents have moved beyond generating responses to executing multi-step tasks by calling tools, observing the results, and iteratively deciding the next action. Most agent systems run on desktops or servers, which support tool use and task automation. Mobile devices are also...
items.summary_cn: 大型语言模型（ LLM ）代理已经超越了通过调用工具、观察结果和迭代决定下一步操作来生成对执行多步骤任务的响应。大多数代理系统在桌面或服务器上运行，支持工具使用和任务自动化。移动设备也是...
items.comment: AI 模型迭代快得飞起，有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: OpenAI researcher Miles Wang in talks to launch AI drug discovery startup valued at $2B
items.title_cn: OpenAI研究员Miles Wang在谈论推出价值20亿美元的人工智能药物发现初创公司
items.summary: The funding discussions point to investor interest in applying AI to make breakthroughs in life sciences.
items.summary_cn: 融资讨论表明，投资者有兴趣应用人工智能在生命科学方面取得突破。
items.comment: 新模型发布，效果先观望，按 token 计费的玩法，用得起吗？

items.title: Lorde says AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
items.summary: "Increasingly in our world, it gets harder and harder to know what is real," Lorde said onstage.
items.summary_cn: “在我们的世界里，越来越难知道什么是真实的，”洛德在舞台上说。
items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。

items.title: OpenAI’s first hardware device is reportedly a screenless speaker that can move
items.title_cn: 据报道， OpenAI的第一个硬件设备是一款可以移动的无屏幕扬声器，
items.summary: The device is weirdly described as involving "mechanical elements that can move on their own" and the Bloomberg report includes the detail that the device is designed to "feel like a companion and become a physical manifestation of OpenAI’s ChatGPT."
items.summary_cn: 该设备被奇怪地描述为涉及“可以自行移动的机械元件” ，彭博社的报告包括该设备旨在“感觉像一个伴侣，并成为OpenAI的ChatGPT的物理表现”的细节。
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。
